claim: Entity identity = uuid5(NAMESPACE_OID, normalized-name) so same name collides to one node + auto-merges at write, no fuzzy/LLM.
maps_to: save/index path + handlers/causal-graph.ts entity node creation

claim: Edges dedup on deterministic src+rel+tgt key so repeated extraction of a relationship is idempotent at write.
Loads existing_edges_map from the live graph before integrating a new chunk graph so new triples merge, not duplicate.
Snap each entity/type to closest controlled-vocab class, regenerate id from canonical name, record alias -> synonyms collapse to one node.
Graph retrieval runs N rounds feeding the current completion back as the next query, merging new triplets, stopping when a round adds nothing (check_convergence).
Ranks triplets blending vector distance + node importance_weight + feedback_weight, seeds top-k, expands neighborhood, re-runs ID-filtered vector search, applies hop-distance penalty (6.5).
Node-first multi-round extraction (feeds previous_nodes back to raise recall) then a separate relation-binding pass; decouples entity recall from edge extraction.
maps_to: LLM extraction stage of save/index path

claim: For structured rows, skip LLM and build graph edges deterministically from schema/FK metadata.
maps_to: save/index path for structured internal data (spec metadata, file/spec relations)

claim: Cognee supersedes Mem0's dedup half (uuid5 + ontology = zero-LLM entity merge vs Mem0's LLM round); extends Mem0 ranking with structural neighborhood + feedback_weight + hop-penalty; Mem0 entity-cardinality-penalty has no Cognee analog (Cognee uses hop-distance instead - complementary).
